summary: THREE_ROW: top panel shows f(t) = cos(2π·1·t) + 0.6·cos(2π·3·t) + 0.3·cos(2π·6·t); middle panel shows the windowed integrand f(t)·cos(2π·ξ·t) with shaded area updated by ValueTracker ξ; bottom panel progressively traces the magnitude spectrum |f̂(ξ)| as ξ sweeps 0→8, peaks materializing at ξ=1, 3, 6 with relative heights 1, 0.6, 0.3.
